UCS-100  CARBON STEEL PLATE — GENERAL REQUIREMENTS. (a) Carbon steel plate used for pressure vessel construction shall conform to one of the specifications listed in the tables of this paragraph. (b) Material shall be identified in accordance with UG-81 and UCS-115. (c) The maximum allowable stress values shall be taken from UCS-23. Impact testing shall be performed when required by UCS-56 and UCS-66. For general material requirements, see UG-80. Design thickness shall be in accordance with UG-27. Refer to UG-84 for Charpy test requirements.
